docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ EDUARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUEDA ORLANDO $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,008.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
IN THE EVENT OF COLLECTION BY ORLANDO RUEDA OF INSURANCE. ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE J. DESMOND.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT RUEDA ORLANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-21-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-06-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUEDA ORLANDO
STIPULATED BY ALL PARTIES THAT ORLANDO RUEDA WILL PAY EDUARDO MARTINEZ $60.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING MARCH 1992. UNTIL JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED & THAT IN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $44.80 ACCRUED INTEREST, $50.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT RUEDA ORLANDO
